problem: Why do traumatic memories become locked and intrusive — what neural mechanism?
mechanism: Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine
hypothesis: Why do traumatic memories become locked and intrusive — what neural mechanism? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Cortical. Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 20 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
